wordplay_note: The familiar man who may be an alien bomb
card_description: Spence Olham (meaning "Olham = old home / old hamlet") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Impostor*. Engineer accused of being an alien-planted humanoid bomb duplicate. Name note: The familiar man who may be an alien bomb. Identity doubt at its most extreme — am I me or a weapon that thinks it is me?. First appears in *Impostor*.

reference.brief: Engineer accused of being an alien-planted humanoid bomb duplicate
reference.significance: Identity doubt at its most extreme — am I me or a weapon that thinks it is me?
